name: Sushant Lokhande
tagline: MS CS new grad from San José State building ML systems and production backends — malware-classification research, RAG platforms, and microservices on AWS.
about: I'm a recent MS Computer Science graduate from San José State University (May 2026, GPA 3.8), where my thesis research on image-based malware classification became a co-authored paper now under review.

I like building across the stack: PyTorch training pipelines on CUDA, FastAPI microservices on AWS, and LLM-powered products grounded with RAG. Before grad school, I shipped production Python microservices at an edtech platform serving ~70K users.
I work AI-native — Cursor and Claude Code are part of my daily loop — and I ship something small every day. Currently looking for full-time SWE and ML roles in the Bay Area.

research.title: Image-Based Techniques and Ensemble Soft Voting for Malware Classification
research.detail: S. Lokhande, F. Di Troia, M. Stamp — under review, 2026

research.title: Comprehensive Big Data Analytics Dashboard on Chats
